subscription_screen.title: Upgrade to Pro
subscription_screen.subtitle: Unlock the full potential of Sophie AI and master any language.

launch.name: Launch Pack
launch.description: For serious learners who want to speak confidently.

subscription_screen.footer: All plans include 24/7 AI tutor access and Progress Tracking. Cancel anytime from your settings.

two_factor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
two_factor.enable_body: A verification code will be sent to your email each time you sign in from a new session. This adds an extra layer of security to your account.
two_factor.disable_body: This will remove the extra security layer from your account. You will no longer need to verify a code when signing in.
two_factor.otp_error_invalid: Invalid or expired code. Please try again.
two_factor.otp_sent: Verification code sent to your email.

strong_password.title: Use a strong password
strong_password.body: Mix letters, numbers, and special characters for maximum protection.

enable_2fa.title: Enable two-factor auth
enable_2fa.body: An extra layer of security for your account. Enable it in the settings above.

change_password_modal.title: Change Password
change_password_modal.error_length: Password must be at least 6 characters long.
change_password_modal.success_message: Your password has been updated successfully.

progress_screen.title: Progress
progress_screen.coming_soon_body: Detailed learning analytics and progress tracking will be available in a future update.

support_screen.title: Support
support_screen.whatsapp_message: Hi Sophie Team! 👋 I'm using the Sophie AI app and would love to connect with you.
support_screen.contact_alert_body: Email us at support@fluentai.com for any questions or feedback.
support_screen.feedback_alert_body: In-app feedback feature will be available soon.
support_screen.delete_account_alert_body: This feature is coming soon. Your data is safe.

privacy_policy_screen.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_policy_screen.section1_body: We collect information to provide better services to all our users. This includes account details like your name, email, and preferred languages, as well as usage data to improve our AI models.
privacy_policy_screen.section2_body: Your data is used to personalize your learning experience, track progress, and refine our AI's accuracy. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
privacy_policy_screen.section3_body: Conversations and inputs provided within the app are processed to generate AI responses. This data may be used in an anonymized way to train and improve the language learning models.
privacy_policy_screen.section4_body: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
privacy_policy_screen.section5_body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information at any time through the account settings or by contacting our support team.
privacy_policy_screen.section6_body: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at support@fluentai.com.

terms_screen.title: Terms of Service
terms_screen.section1_body: By accessing and using this application, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you may not use our services.
terms_screen.section2_body: You agree to use this application for personal, non-commercial language learning purposes only. You must not use the services for any illegal or unauthorized purpose.
terms_screen.section3_body: Users are expected to interact with the AI assistant respectfully. Any attempt to exploit, harm, or bypass the application's intended functionality is strictly prohibited.
terms_screen.section4_body: The application, its content, and AI models are protected by copyright and other intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce or distribute any part of the service without permission.
terms_screen.section5_body: Our service provides AI-generated content for educational purposes. While we strive for accuracy, the AI may occasionally provide incorrect information. Users are encouraged to verify important details.
terms_screen.section6_body: We are not liable for any direct, indirect, or consequential damages resulting from your use of the application or any information provided by the AI assistant.
terms_screen.section7_body: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Your continued use of the application after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the new terms.

social_screen.title: Social Media
social_screen.open_error: Could not open {platform}. Please try again later.
social_screen.general_error: An error occurred while trying to open {platform}.

create_modal.title: Create Scenario
create_modal.sophie_role_placeholder: e.g. A grumpy but helpful shopkeeper
create_modal.user_role_placeholder: e.g. A customer in a hurry
create_modal.validation_message: Sophie's Role and Topic are required!

ordering-coffee.title: Ordering Coffee
ordering-coffee.description: Order a latte and a croissant at a busy café.
ordering-coffee.sophieRole: Barista at a busy city center café
ordering-coffee.context: You are at a café called "The Morning Grind". You want to order a coffee and something to eat.

job-interview.title: Job Interview
job-interview.description: Interview for a software engineer position.
job-interview.sophieRole: Senior Technical Recruiter at a tech company
job-interview.userRole: Candidate applying for a Frontend Developer role
job-interview.context: You are in an interview for your dream job. Sophie will ask about your experience and skills.

asking-directions.title: Asking Directions
asking-directions.description: You are lost in Tokyo and need to find a train station.
asking-directions.sophieRole: A helpful local resident in Tokyo
asking-directions.userRole: A tourist who is slightly lost
asking-directions.context: You are near Shibuya Crossing and need to get to the JR station but your phone battery is dead.

hotel-check-in.title: Hotel Check-in
hotel-check-in.description: Check in and ask for a room and a view.
hotel-check-in.sophieRole: Front desk receptionist at a 4-star hotel
hotel-check-in.userRole: A guest arriving for a three-night stay
hotel-check-in.context: You have a reservation under your name. You want to confirm the breakfast times and ask if there is a room with a nice view available.

political-debate.title: Political Debate
political-debate.description: Discuss environmental policies and climate change.
political-debate.userRole: A skeptical citizen or opposing policy maker
political-debate.context: Engage in a deep discussion about the balance between economic growth and environmental protection.
